name: eocanvas

metadata.name: eocanvas
metadata.summary: A Python wrapper to WEkEO Serverless Functions

documentation:
# eocanvas

EOCanvas provides a Python 3.8+ client to interact with the WEkEO Serverless Functions service API.

The documentation about the service can be found at https://wekeo.eu.

The documentation for this package can be found at: https://eocanvas.readthedocs.io/en/latest/

## Contribution

Contribute to the development of this client by creating an account on GitHub. You can follow this guidelines for a general overview of the needed steps: https://github.com/firstcontributions/first-contributions.

Pull requests are welcome. For major changes, please open an issue first to discuss what you would like to change.

Please make sure to update this README as appropriate - changes on the interface, version etc.

## Licence
Please refer to LICENSE.txt

modules.name: eocanvas.snap
documentation:
Code in this package is largely based on https://github.com/snap-contrib/snapista/.

Snapista requires a local instance of Snap.
We unwired the dependency as we only need to build or load the graph.
All the operators are statically listed.

modules.name: eocanvas.snap.utils
documentation:
This module contains a utility to extract and save to a local json file all the
SNAP operators metadata.
It requires a full Snapista installation through conda or mamba and a local SNAP
instance, which comes with Snapista.
pytype: skip-file

methods.name: eocanvas.snap.operator.Operator.describe
documentation:
This function prints the human readable information about a SNAP operator

Args:
    operator: SNAP operator

Returns
    The human readable information about the provided SNAP operator.

Raises:
    None.

methods.name: eocanvas.snap.operator.Operator._get_formats
documentation:
This function provides a human readable list of SNAP Read or Write operator formats.

Args:
    None.

Returns
    Human readable list of SNAP Write operator formats.

Raises:
    None.

modules.name: eocanvas.datatailor.chain
documentation:
Data Tailor classes.

Most of the code has been taken from the official EUMDAC library
(https://pypi.org/project/eumdac/).
Changes have been made to the Chain class to create instances from a yaml file and
to encode it to base64 representation as required by the API.

functions.name: eocanvas.datatailor.chain._none_filter
documentation: Build a mapping of '*args' and '**kwargs' removing None values.

classes.name: eocanvas.datatailor.chain.AsDictMixin

methods.name: eocanvas.datatailor.chain.AsDictMixin.asdict
documentation:
Return the fields of the instance as a new dictionary mapping field names to
field values, removing None values.
Base class adding an 'asdict' method that removes None values.

classes.name: eocanvas.datatailor.chain.Filter

class_variables.name: eocanvas.datatailor.chain.Filter.bands
documentation: type: ignore[type-arg]

Layer filter, a list of `bands` or layers for a given `product`.

Attributes
----------
- `id`: *str*
- `name`: *str*
    Human readable name.
- `product`: *str*
    Product that the filter applies to.
- `bands`: *list[dict]*
    List of bands part of the filter, as dicts of {id, number, name}.

classes.name: eocanvas.datatailor.chain.RegionOfInterest
documentation:
Region of interest, a geographical area defined by its `NSWE` coordinates.

Attributes
----------
- `id`: *str*
- `name`: *str*
    Human readable name.
- `description`: *str*
    Human readable description.
- `NSWE`:
    North, south, west, east coordinates, in decimal degrees.

classes.name: eocanvas.exceptions.EOCanvasError
documentation: Base class for EO Canvas exceptions.

classes.name: eocanvas.exceptions.CredentialsError
documentation: Generic error regarding the credentials.

classes.name: eocanvas.exceptions.MalformedCredentialsError
documentation: Malformed credentials error.

classes.name: eocanvas.exceptions.CorruptedCredentialsError
documentation: Credentials file is bad YAML.

classes.name: eocanvas.exceptions.CredentialsNotFoundError
documentation: Missing credentials file.

classes.name: eocanvas.exceptions.HTTPError
documentation: Exception on low level HTTP errors.

classes.name: eocanvas.exceptions.QuotaExceededError
documentation: Exception on user quota exceeded.

classes.name: eocanvas.exceptions.MalformedSnapError
documentation: Exception on malformed SNAP operators file.

classes.name: eocanvas.exceptions.SnapOperatorNotFound
documentation: Exception on non-existent SNAP operator.

classes.name: eocanvas.exceptions.JobFailed
documentation: Exception on a job that returns failed status.

classes.name: eocanvas.exceptions.InvalidChainError
documentation: Exception on invalid YAML file for a Data Tailor Chain.

classes.name: eocanvas.exceptions.NotDownloadableError
documentation: Exception on results that are not downloadable, coming from an external source

classes.name: eocanvas.exceptions.UnknownResultTypeError
documentation: Results of unknown rel type.

classes.name: eocanvas.snap.graph.Graph

methods.name: eocanvas.snap.graph.Graph.list_operators
documentation:
This function provides a Python dictionary with all SNAP operators.

Args:

Returns

Raises:
    None.

documentation:
This function provides a Python dictionary with all SNAP operators.

    None.

Returns

Raises:

Returns

methods.name: eocanvas.snap.graph.Graph.add_node
documentation:
This method adds or overwrites a node to the SNAP Graph

Args:
    operator: SNAP operator
    node_id: node identifier
    source: string or list of sources (previous node identifiers in the SNAP Graph)

Returns
    None.

Raises:
    None.

methods.name: eocanvas.snap.graph.Graph.save_graph
documentation:
This method saves the SNAP Graph

Args:
    filename: XML filename with '.xml' extension

Returns
    None.

Raises:
    None.

SNAP Graph class

This class provides the methods to create, view and run a SNAP Graph

Attributes:
    None.

modules.name: eocanvas.http
documentation: HTTP functions. Inspired by EUMDAC request module.

functions.name: eocanvas.http.get_adapter
documentation:
Returns an HTTPAdapter able to handling retries.
See: <https://requests.readthedocs.io/en/latest/user/advanced/#example-automatic-retries>

```
param max_retries

Max number of retries before failing

type max_retries

int

param backoff_factor

A backoff factor to apply between attempts after the second try

type backoff_factor

float
```

functions.name: eocanvas.http.get
documentation:
Perform a GET HTTP request to the given `url` with the given parameters.

Retries will be managed in a transparent way when making the request.

```
param url

URL to make the request to

type url

str

param kwargs

Extra arguments to pass to the request, refer to the requests library
documentation for a list of possible arguments.

type kwargs

dict, optional

return

Response received from the server

rtype

requests.Response
```

functions.name: eocanvas.http.post
documentation:
Perform a POST HTTP request to the given `url` with the given parameters.

Retries and throttling will be managed in a transparent way when making the request.

```
param url

URL to make the request to

type url

str

param kwargs

Extra arguments to pass to the request, refer to the requests library
documentation for a list of possible arguments.

type kwargs

dict, optional

return

Response received from the server

rtype

requests.Response
```

functions.name: eocanvas.api.transform_data
documentation: Remaps the dictionary keys according to the mapping.

documentation: Discards dictionary keys that don't match with any dataclass field.

classes.name: eocanvas.api.API

methods.name: eocanvas.api.API.get_process
documentation:
Gets the details of a process.

Returns:

: A {class}`eocanvas.api.Process` instance.

methods.name: eocanvas.api.API.get_processes
documentation:
Gets the list of available processes.
There should be only SNAP and Datatailor functions.

Returns:

: A list of {class}`eocanvas.api.Process` instances.

methods.name: eocanvas.api.API.exec_process
documentation:
Submits a process to the API.

Returns:

: A {class}`eocanvas.api.Job` instance.

methods.name: eocanvas.api.API.get_job
documentation:
Gets the details of a job.

Returns:

: A {class}`eocanvas.api.Job` instance.

methods.name: eocanvas.api.API.get_jobs
documentation:
Gets the list of user submitted jobs.

Returns:

: A list of {class}`eocanvas.api.Job` instances.

methods.name: eocanvas.api.API.get_job_logs
documentation:
Gets the log entries for a job.

Args:

: job: Either a {class}`eocanvas.api.Job` instance or the `job_id`

Returns:

: A list of {class}`eocanvas.api.LogEntry` instances.

methods.name: eocanvas.api.API.get_job_results
documentation:
Gets the results for a job.

Args:

: job: Either a {class}`eocanvas.api.Job` instance or the `job_id`

Returns:

: A list of {class}`eocanvas.api.Result` instances.

Models the Serverless Functions API endpoints.

Attributes:

: urls: The {class}`eocanvas.config.URLs` object that maps all the API endpoints
  credentials: A {class}`eocanvas.auth.Credentials` object with username and password

classes.name: eocanvas.api.Job

methods.name: eocanvas.api.Job.refresh_from_api
documentation: Reloads the job attributes from the API.
Represents an API job, that is a submission of a process.

classes.name: eocanvas.api.Key
documentation:
A key object as returned by the API.
Keys are used to configure external storages such as S3, EODATA and WEkEO Drive.

classes.name: eocanvas.api._APIParam
documentation:
A simple dataclass with an optional api parameter.
This is used to avoid `non-default argument 'foo' follows default argument`

classes.name: eocanvas.api.KeyConfig
documentation: A configuration object that encrypt either an S3 or a WEBDAV key

classes.name: eocanvas.api.S3KeyConfig
documentation: A configuration for S3-like keys.

classes.name: eocanvas.api.WebDavKeyConfig
documentation: A configuration for WebDav-like keys.

classes.name: eocanvas.api.Process
documentation: A process defines either a SNAP or a Datatailor function.
